positive: A minimal, elegant line art silhouette of a stylized mountain range at sunset. The mountains are depicted using bold, clean linework with strong negative space contrast against a vibrant gradient background of deep indigo, burnt orange, and warm gold. Include a few geometrically placed, minimalist stars and a crescent moon. The design should be highly symmetrical and easily readable as a repeating pattern or centered on a vertical surface. Vector graphic quality, extreme detail, high contrast, suitable for apparel screen printing, clean vector illustration, golden ratio composition, flat design aesthetic, crisp linework.
negative: blurry, watermark, text, logo, trademark, dirty, rough, grainy, noise, poor anatomy, bad edges, extra limbs, disfigured, poor composition, complex shading, photorealism, gradient mess
